headline: Iran-war crowded trades unwinding: fade defense & gold spikes, accumulate crushed airlines & consumer names — vol is calm, no VXX spike to fade.

status_label: 10 SETUPS · TECH OVERSOLD / ENERGY-GOLD DUAL EXTREME
headline: Mag-7 tech rout creates broadest oversold sweep since March — MSFT, GLD, SLV, GDX at multi-measure extremes while oil and cybersecurity (PANW) flash overbought; VIX at 18 with no spike to fade.
